## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss RSS integration and newsletter design strategies for GrowthX's upcoming newsletter launch on beehiiv's platform.](https://fathom.video/share/ERxe1bff8KCesqL4EtPxrLzPsUZ3KgLz?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Manual authoring provides more design control than RSS feeds for now, though RSS is useful for news-heavy orgs with frequent publishing](https://fathom.video/share/ERxe1bff8KCesqL4EtPxrLzPsUZ3KgLz?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
  - [Email design limitations (like "1999 technology") impact layout options; workarounds like GIFs can enhance engagement](https://fathom.video/share/ERxe1bff8KCesqL4EtPxrLzPsUZ3KgLz?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
  - [beehiiv offers CSM packages for dedicated tech support (e.g., Victor) or strategy consulting (e.g., Tyler, DK) as clients scale](https://fathom.video/share/ERxe1bff8KCesqL4EtPxrLzPsUZ3KgLz?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)

## Topics

### RSS vs. Manual Authoring

  - [RSS feeds work well for news-heavy orgs with frequent publishing](https://fathom.video/share/ERxe1bff8KCesqL4EtPxrLzPsUZ3KgLz?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
  - [Manual authoring currently offers more design control in beehiiv's system](https://fathom.video/share/ERxe1bff8KCesqL4EtPxrLzPsUZ3KgLz?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
  - [RSS limitations: less control over spacing, heading sizes; standard H2 \~24px](https://fathom.video/share/ERxe1bff8KCesqL4EtPxrLzPsUZ3KgLz?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [Future development may allow more RSS-specific styling options](https://fathom.video/share/ERxe1bff8KCesqL4EtPxrLzPsUZ3KgLz?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)

### Design Considerations for Email

  - [Email uses "1999 technology," limiting some design capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/ERxe1bff8KCesqL4EtPxrLzPsUZ3KgLz?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
  - [Two-column layouts preferred; three columns can be problematic](https://fathom.video/share/ERxe1bff8KCesqL4EtPxrLzPsUZ3KgLz?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
  - [Icons/images require workarounds (e.g., column structure, emojis)](https://fathom.video/share/ERxe1bff8KCesqL4EtPxrLzPsUZ3KgLz?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [GIFs can create more interactive, engaging content than static embeds](https://fathom.video/share/ERxe1bff8KCesqL4EtPxrLzPsUZ3KgLz?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)

### Design Inspiration and Examples

  - [beehiiv team has collected strong newsletter examples](https://fathom.video/share/ERxe1bff8KCesqL4EtPxrLzPsUZ3KgLz?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
  - [Highlighted newsletters: Claymation, Coinsnacks, The Mighty, Prof G, The Neuron](https://fathom.video/share/ERxe1bff8KCesqL4EtPxrLzPsUZ3KgLz?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [Web versions of newsletters often available for reference](https://fathom.video/share/ERxe1bff8KCesqL4EtPxrLzPsUZ3KgLz?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)

### Content Display Strategies

  - [For varied content (tweets, quotes, videos), consider:](https://fathom.video/share/ERxe1bff8KCesqL4EtPxrLzPsUZ3KgLz?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
    1.  Two-column layout for balance
    2.  Using GIFs or short video clips to increase engagement
    3.  Screenshots or custom graphics for tweets instead of embeds
    4.  Hyperlinking images/GIFs to source content

### beehiiv's Additional Services

  - [CSM packages available for scaling clients](https://fathom.video/share/ERxe1bff8KCesqL4EtPxrLzPsUZ3KgLz?tab=summary&timestamp=1271.0)
  - [Options include dedicated tech support (e.g., Victor for custom solutions)](https://fathom.video/share/ERxe1bff8KCesqL4EtPxrLzPsUZ3KgLz?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)
  - [Strategy consulting available with top newsletter experts (e.g., Tyler, DK)](https://fathom.video/share/ERxe1bff8KCesqL4EtPxrLzPsUZ3KgLz?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)

## Next Steps

  - [George to finalize newsletter design mock-up](https://fathom.video/share/ERxe1bff8KCesqL4EtPxrLzPsUZ3KgLz?tab=summary&timestamp=1218.0)
  - [Confirm ability to manage multiple client accounts through beehiiv](https://fathom.video/share/ERxe1bff8KCesqL4EtPxrLzPsUZ3KgLz?tab=summary&timestamp=1232.0)
  - [George to provide decision on moving forward by Monday](https://fathom.video/share/ERxe1bff8KCesqL4EtPxrLzPsUZ3KgLz?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)
  - [Dane to follow up with George on Monday regarding the deal closure](https://fathom.video/share/ERxe1bff8KCesqL4EtPxrLzPsUZ3KgLz?tab=summary&timestamp=1271.0)
